metadata.description: Turn your Timeln library into a live second brain for your AI agent

plugins.name: timeln-secondbrain
plugins.description: Acts as the user's virtual second brain -- pulls real data from their Timeln account via the Timeln MCP server, applies MECE gap analysis and the PARA framework, then returns crisp learning/action recommendations and optionally a D3 knowledge-graph visualization. Use when the user says 'second brain', 'thinking partner', 'what should I learn today', 'connect my ideas', 'show my knowledge gaps', or asks any question prefixed with 'based on my past data'.
